testcase.name: runScenario["Login with valid email and password", "Open Cart Login Module"](1)
testcase.system-out:
Browser set: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Browser set: edge | Thread ID: 32
Scenario: Login with valid email and password # src/test/resources/Features/Feature1_Login.feature:3
Scenario: Login with valid email and password # src/test/resources/Features/Feature1_Login.feature:3 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected My account tab Selected My account tab Selected login option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab() Selected login option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab() Entered email Entered email Entered password Entered password Selected login button ✔ When User enters valid email and password and click on sign in # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_valid_email_and_password_and_click_on_sign_in() Selected login button ✔ When User enters valid email and password and click on sign in # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_valid_email_and_password_and_click_on_sign_in() My account setting displayed My account setting displayed My orders setting displayed My orders setting displayed ✔ Then User navigated to users account homepage and verified the page # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_navigated_to_users_account_homepage_and_verified_the_page() ✔ Then User navigated to users account homepage and verified the page # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_navigated_to_users_account_homepage_and_verified_the_page()

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with invalid email and password # src/test/resources/Features/Feature1_Login.feature:14 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected My account tab Selected login option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_my_account_tab() Entered email Entered password Selected login option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_my_account_tab() Entered email Selected login button ✔ When User enters invalid "yog@gmail.com" and "Yog@123" and click on sign in # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_invalid_and_and_click_on_sign_in(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Entered password Selected login button ✔ When User enters invalid "yog@gmail.com" and "Yog@123" and click on sign in # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_invalid_and_and_click_on_sign_in(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Getting warning message ✔ Then User will get the Error message # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_will_get_the_error_message() Getting warning message ✔ Then User will get the Error message # StepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_will_get_the_error_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Register user with valid Details", "Open Cart Registration Module"](6)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Register user with valid Details # src/test/resources/Features/Feature2_Registration.feature:8 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select register option in account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_register_option_in_account_tab() Entered firstname Entered lastname Selected My account tab Entered email Entered mobile no Entered password Entered confirm password ✔ When User enter all necessary details # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enter_all_necessary_details() Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select register option in account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_register_option_in_account_tab() Clicked privacy policy check box Entered firstname Entered lastname Entered email Entered mobile no Entered password Entered confirm password ✔ When User enter all necessary details # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enter_all_necessary_details() Clicked privacy policy check box Clicked continue ✔ And Click checkbox and click on continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.click_checkbox_and_click_on_continue() Clicked continue ✔ And Click checkbox and click on continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.click_checkbox_and_click_on_continue() Account created successfully ✔ Then User successfully registered and verify successful account creation # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_successfully_registered_and_verify_successful_account_creation() Account created successfully ✔ Then User successfully registered and verify successful account creation # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_successfully_registered_and_verify_successful_account_creation()

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Register User with existing email # src/test/resources/Features/Feature2_Registration.feature:20 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected My account tab Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and selected register option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_selected_register_option_in_my_account_tab() Entered firstname Entered lastname Entered email Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and selected register option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_selected_register_option_in_my_account_tab() Entered mobile no Entered firstname Entered password Entered lastname Entered confirm password Entered email Clicked privacy policy check box Entered mobile no Entered password Entered confirm password Clicked privacy policy check box Clicked continue ✔ When User enters all updated details but used existing "yoge@gmail.com" # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_all_updated_details_but_used_existing(java.lang.String) Clicked continue ✔ When User enters all updated details but used existing "yoge@gmail.com" # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_enters_all_updated_details_but_used_existing(java.lang.String) Email Alredy existed message displyed ✔ Then Click continue and verify warning message # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.click_continue_and_verify_warning_message() Email Alredy existed message displyed ✔ Then Click continue and verify warning message # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.click_continue_and_verify_warning_message()

testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify mandatory field validation messages # src/test/resources/Features/Feature2_Registration.feature:23 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select register option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_register_option_in_my_account_tab() No Details entered and clicked continue Selected My account tab Clicked privacy policy check box Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and select register option in my account tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_register_option_in_my_account_tab() No Details entered and clicked continue Clicked privacy policy check box Clicked continue ✔ When User not entered any details and click on continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_not_entered_any_details_and_click_on_continue() Firstname required error message displayed Lastname required error message displayed Email required error message displayed Phone no required error message displayed Password required error message displayed ✔ Then User gets a warning message # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_gets_a_warning_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify mandatory field validation messages", "Open Cart Registration Module"](9)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify password mismatch validation # src/test/resources/Features/Feature2_Registration.feature:28 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Clicked continue ✔ When User not entered any details and click on continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_not_entered_any_details_and_click_on_continue() Firstname required error message displayed Lastname required error message displayed Email required error message displayed Phone no required error message displayed Password required error message displayed ✔ Then User gets a warning message # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_gets_a_warning_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify password mismatch validation", "Open Cart Registration Module"](10)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify password mismatch validation # src/test/resources/Features/Feature2_Registration.feature:28 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected My account tab Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and selected register option in my accounts tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_selected_register_option_in_my_accounts_tab() Entered firstname Entered lastname Entered email Entered mobile no Selected Register option ✔ Given User is on hompage and selected register option in my accounts tab # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_selected_register_option_in_my_accounts_tab() Entered password Entered confirm password Entered firstname Entered lastname Clicked privacy policy check box Entered email Clicked continue ✔ When User entered all details but used two different passwords and click continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_entered_all_details_but_used_two_different_passwords_and_click_continue() Entered mobile no Entered password Entered confirm password Clicked privacy policy check box Clicked continue ✔ When User entered all details but used two different passwords and click continue # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_entered_all_details_but_used_two_different_passwords_and_click_continue() Password mismatch error message displayed ✔ Then User gets the Password mismatch error message and verify # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_gets_the_password_mismatch_error_message_and_verify()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify password mismatch validation", "Open Cart Registration Module"](10)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product using valid keyword # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:9 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Password mismatch error message displayed ✔ Then User gets the Password mismatch error message and verify # StepDefinitions.RegistrationSteps.user_gets_the_password_mismatch_error_message_and_verify()

testcase.name: runScenario["Search Product using valid keyword", "Open Cart Product Module"](11)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product using valid keyword # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:9 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected login option Selected My account tab Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and login to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_login_to_account() Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and login to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_login_to_account() iMac name send to check box Clicked search button ✔ When User enters "iMac" name using valid keyword and click search button # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_enters_name_using_valid_keyword_and_click_search_button(java.lang.String) iMac name send to check box iMac Products displayed ✔ Then User redirect to product results page and verify user got the related "iMac" # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_redirect_to_product_results_page_and_verify_user_got_the_related(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Search Product using valid keyword", "Open Cart Product Module"](11)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product using valid keyword # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:10 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Clicked search button ✔ When User enters "iMac" name using valid keyword and click search button # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_enters_name_using_valid_keyword_and_click_search_button(java.lang.String) iMac Products displayed ✔ Then User redirect to product results page and verify user got the related "iMac" # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_redirect_to_product_results_page_and_verify_user_got_the_related(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Search Product using valid keyword", "Open Cart Product Module"](12)

using valid keyword and click search button(file:///C:/Users/YOGESWAR/OneDrive/Desktop/SDET_Capstone_Project/Capstone_Project_OpenCart/CapstoneOpenCartProject/src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:5) ↷ Then User redirect to product results page and verify user got the related "iPhone" # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_redirect_to_product_results_page_and_verify_user_got_the_related(java.lang.String) Selected My account tab

testcase.name: runScenario["Search Product using valid keyword", "Open Cart Product Module"](12)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product using invalid keyword # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:18 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and login to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_login_to_account() iPhone name send to check box Clicked search button ✔ When User enters "iPhone" name using valid keyword and click search button # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_enters_name_using_valid_keyword_and_click_search_button(java.lang.String) Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and loggedin to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_loggedin_to_account() iPhone Products displayed ✔ Then User redirect to product results page and verify user got the related "iPhone" # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_redirect_to_product_results_page_and_verify_user_got_the_related(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Search Product using invalid keyword", "Open Cart Product Module"](13)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product using invalid keyword # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:18 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 abcd123 name send to check box Clicked search button ✔ When User enter "abcd123" name using invalid keyword and click search button # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_enter_name_using_invalid_keyword_and_click_search_button(java.lang.String) No related products displayed ✔ Then User redirect to product result page and verify user got the related "abcd123" # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_redirect_to_product_result_page_and_verify_user_got_the_related(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Search Product using invalid keyword", "Open Cart Product Module"](13)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product using invalid keyword # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:19 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and loggedin to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_loggedin_to_account() abcd123 name send to check box Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Clicked search button ✔ When User enter "abcd123" name using invalid keyword and click search button # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_enter_name_using_invalid_keyword_and_click_search_button(java.lang.String) No related products displayed ✔ Then User redirect to product result page and verify user got the related "abcd123" # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_redirect_to_product_result_page_and_verify_user_got_the_related(java.lang.String) Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and loggedin to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_loggedin_to_account()

testcase.name: runScenario["Search Product using invalid keyword", "Open Cart Product Module"](14)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product with empty field # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:21 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on hompage and select login option in account tab and loggedin to account # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_hompage_and_select_login_option_in_account_tab_and_loggedin_to_account() dummy45cc name send to check box Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Clicked search button ✔ When User enter "dummy45cc" name using invalid keyword and click search button # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_enter_name_using_invalid_keyword_and_click_search_button(java.lang.String) No related products displayed ✔ Then User redirect to product result page and verify user got the related "dummy45cc" # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_redirect_to_product_result_page_and_verify_user_got_the_related(java.lang.String) Selected login button ✔ Given User is on home page and selected register option in my accounts tab # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_home_page_and_selected_register_option_in_my_accounts_tab()

testcase.name: runScenario["Search Product with empty field", "Open Cart Product Module"](15)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search Product with empty field # src/test/resources/Features/Feature3_Product.feature:21 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Clicked search button ✔ When User click search button with empty filed # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_click_search_button_with_empty_filed() No related products displayed ✔ Then User navigated to page with no products displayed # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_navigated_to_page_with_no_products_displayed()

testcase.name: runScenario["Search Product with empty field", "Open Cart Product Module"](15)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add product to cart # src/test/resources/Features/Feature4_Cart.feature:3 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on homepage and logged into account # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_is_on_homepage_and_logged_into_account() Selected login button ✔ Given User is on home page and selected register option in my accounts tab # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_is_on_home_page_and_selected_register_option_in_my_accounts_tab() Clicked search button ✔ When User click search button with empty filed # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_click_search_button_with_empty_filed() No related products displayed ✔ Then User navigated to page with no products displayed # StepDefinitions.ProductSteps.user_navigated_to_page_with_no_products_displayed()

testcase.name: runScenario["Add product to cart", "Open Cart cart Module"](16)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Add product to cart # src/test/resources/Features/Feature4_Cart.feature:3 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 iMac name send to check box Clicked search button ✔ When User search for product and get the product results # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_search_for_product_and_get_the_product_results() ✔ And User selected the product and navigated to product page # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_selected_the_product_and_navigated_to_product_page() Add to cart button clicked Product Added to cart, success message displayed ✔ Then User selected Add to cart button and verify product added to cart # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_selected_add_to_cart_button_and_verify_product_added_to_cart()

testcase.name: runScenario["Add product to cart", "Open Cart cart Module"](16)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Update product quantity # src/test/resources/Features/Feature4_Cart.feature:9 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on homepage and logged into account # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_is_on_homepage_and_logged_into_account() iMac name send to check box Clicked search button ✔ When User search for product and get the product results # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_search_for_product_and_get_the_product_results() Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password ✔ And User selected the product and navigated to product page # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_selected_the_product_and_navigated_to_product_page() Add to cart button clicked Product Added to cart, success message displayed ✔ Then User selected Add to cart button and verify product added to cart # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_selected_add_to_cart_button_and_verify_product_added_to_cart() Selected login button ✔ Given User is on open cart homepage and logged in to account # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_is_on_open_cart_homepage_and_logged_in_to_account()

testcase.name: runScenario["Update product quantity", "Open Cart cart Module"](17)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Update product quantity # src/test/resources/Features/Feature4_Cart.feature:9 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected shopping cart option ✔ When User select Shopping cart and navigated to cart page # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_select_shopping_cart_and_navigated_to_cart_page() clicked on quanity text box cleared existing quantity update quantity to 2 clicked update cart button ✔ And User updates the quantity of product # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_updates_the_quantity_of_product() Quantity successfully updated to: 2 ✔ Then Verify price changes and quantity updated # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.verify_price_changes_and_quantity_updated()

testcase.name: runScenario["Update product quantity", "Open Cart cart Module"](17)

testcase.name: runScenario["Remove product from cart", "Open Cart cart Module"](18)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Remove product from cart # src/test/resources/Features/Feature4_Cart.feature:15 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected shopping cart option ✔ When User click on Shopping cart and navigated to cart page # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_click_on_shopping_cart_and_navigated_to_cart_page() Clicked remove product button ✔ And User remove product from cart # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_remove_product_from_cart() Cart empty message displayed ✔ Then Verify product removed from cart # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.verify_product_removed_from_cart()

testcase.name: runScenario["Remove product from cart", "Open Cart cart Module"](18)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify empty cart message # src/test/resources/Features/Feature4_Cart.feature:21 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Selected login button ✔ Given User is on demo open cart homepage and logged in to account # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_is_on_demo_open_cart_homepage_and_logged_in_to_account() Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on homepage and log in to account # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_is_on_homepage_and_log_in_to_account() Selected shopping cart option ✔ When User click on Shopping cart and navigated to cart page # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_click_on_shopping_cart_and_navigated_to_cart_page() Clicked remove product button ✔ And User remove product from cart # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_remove_product_from_cart() Cart empty message displayed ✔ Then Verify product removed from cart # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.verify_product_removed_from_cart()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify empty cart message", "Open Cart cart Module"](19)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify empty cart message # src/test/resources/Features/Feature4_Cart.feature:21 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected shopping cart option Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on homepage and log in to account # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_is_on_homepage_and_log_in_to_account() Selected shopping cart option ✔ When User clicked on Shopping cart and navigated to cart page # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_clicked_on_shopping_cart_and_navigated_to_cart_page() Cart empty message displayed ✔ Then Verify Cart empty message displayed # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.verify_cart_empty_message_displayed()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify empty cart message", "Open Cart cart Module"](19)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify Checkout functionality # src/test/resources/Features/Feature5_Checkout.feature:3 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ When User clicked on Shopping cart and navigated to cart page # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.user_clicked_on_shopping_cart_and_navigated_to_cart_page() Cart empty message displayed ✔ Then Verify Cart empty message displayed # StepDefinitions.CartSteps.verify_cart_empty_message_displayed()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify Checkout functionality", "Open Cart Checkout Feature"](20)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify Checkout functionality # src/test/resources/Features/Feature5_Checkout.feature:3 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 hp name send to check box Clicked search button ✔ Given User login to account and search for a product # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_login_to_account_and_search_for_a_product() Add to cart button clicked ✔ When User select product and added to cart # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_select_product_and_added_to_cart() Selected shopping cart option ✔ And User went to cart page and click on checkout button # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_went_to_cart_page_and_click_on_checkout_button() User is on billing details section Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password User is on delivery details section Selected login button hp name send to check box ✔ And User enters billing details and delivery details # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_enters_billing_details_and_delivery_details() Clicked search button ✔ Given User login to account and search for a product # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_login_to_account_and_search_for_a_product() User is on billing section User is on payment method section Add to cart button clicked ✔ When User select product and added to cart # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_select_product_and_added_to_cart() Selected shopping cart option ✔ And User went to cart page and click on checkout button # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_went_to_cart_page_and_click_on_checkout_button() User is on confirm order section User is on billing details section ✔ And User enters delivery method and payment method and confirm order # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_enters_delivery_method_and_payment_method_and_confirm_order() Order confirmation message displayed ✔ Then User get the order confirmation message # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_get_the_order_confirmation_message() User is on delivery details section

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify Checkout functionality", "Open Cart Checkout Feature"](20)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //a[contains(text(),'Delivery Method')], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[contains(text(),'Delivery Method')]"}. (tried for 15 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 148.0.3967.83, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 17752, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:61801}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 148.0.3967.83 (2db6d3cb8b2d..., userDataDir: C:\Users\YOGESWAR\AppData\L...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:61801/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.3967.83, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 9e2ae984cc54c8045c3d9fcbd78af1cd

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //a[contains(text(),'Delivery Method')], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[contains(text(),'Delivery Method')]"}. (tried for 15 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 148.0.3967.83, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 17752, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:61801}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 148.0.3967.83 (2db6d3cb8b2d..., userDataDir: C:\Users\YOGESWAR\AppData\L...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:61801/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.3967.83, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 9e2ae984cc54c8045c3d9fcbd78af1cd at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:85) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:234) at Pages.CheckoutPage.checkDeliveryMethod(CheckoutPage.java:50) at StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_enters_delivery_method_and_payment_method_and_confirm_order(CheckoutSteps.java:63) at ✽.User enters delivery method and payment method and confirm order(file:///C:/Users/YOGESWAR/OneDrive/Desktop/SDET_Capstone_Project/Capstone_Project_OpenCart/CapstoneOpenCartProject/src/test/resources/Features/Feature5_Checkout.feature:8)
testcase.system-out: ✘ And User enters delivery method and payment method and confirm order # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_enters_delivery_method_and_payment_method_and_confirm_order() org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //a[contains(text(),'Delivery Method')], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[contains(text(),'Delivery Method')]"}. (tried for 15 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 148.0.3967.83, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 17752, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:61801}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 148.0.3967.83 (2db6d3cb8b2d..., userDataDir: C:\Users\YOGESWAR\AppData\L...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:61801/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.3967.83, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 9e2ae984cc54c8045c3d9fcbd78af1cd at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:85) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:234) at Pages.CheckoutPage.checkDeliveryMethod(CheckoutPage.java:50) at StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_enters_delivery_method_and_payment_method_and_confirm_order(CheckoutSteps.java:63) at ✽.User enters delivery method and payment method and confirm order(file:///C:/Users/YOGESWAR/OneDrive/Desktop/SDET_Capstone_Project/Capstone_Project_OpenCart/CapstoneOpenCartProject/src/test/resources/Features/Feature5_Checkout.feature:8) ↷ Then User get the order confirmation message # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_get_the_order_confirmation_message()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify logout functionality", "Open Cart Logout Module"](21)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify logout functionality # src/test/resources/Features/Feature6_Logout.feature:3 Launching Browser: chrome | Thread ID: 31 ✔ And User enters billing details and delivery details # StepDefinitions.CheckoutSteps.user_enters_billing_details_and_delivery_details() Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on home page and logins to account # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_is_on_home_page_and_logins_to_account() ✔ When Select My Account Option and click on Logout option # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.select_my_account_option_and_click_on_logout_option() User Logged out successfully ✔ And User logged out from account and verify session termination # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_logged_out_from_account_and_verify_session_termination() User successfully navigated to homepage after logout ✔ Then User click continue to redirect to homepage # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_click_continue_to_redirect_to_homepage()

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify logout functionality", "Open Cart Logout Module"](21)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify logout functionality # src/test/resources/Features/Feature6_Logout.feature:3 Launching Browser: edge | Thread ID: 32 Selected My account tab Selected login option Entered email Entered password Selected login button ✔ Given User is on home page and logins to account # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_is_on_home_page_and_logins_to_account() ✔ When Select My Account Option and click on Logout option # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.select_my_account_option_and_click_on_logout_option() User Logged out successfully ✔ And User logged out from account and verify session termination # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_logged_out_from_account_and_verify_session_termination() User successfully navigated to homepage after logout ✔ Then User click continue to redirect to homepage # StepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.user_click_continue_to_redirect_to_homepage()
